package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_depends_on_service_package: Repositories that import service packages, which inverts the expected dependency flow.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule127NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule127NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule127NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario127Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule127NegativeService, input Rule127NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
